// 001 — About

Building Intelligence
from Scratch

I am a fresher graduate in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science from KLE College of Engineering & Technology, Chikodi .My academic journey has been driven by a deep curiosity for how machines can think, learn, and make decisions.

I have hands-on experience building end-to-end ML and Gen AI systems — from exploring raw datasets and training deep neural networks, to deploying multi-agent AI pipelines and retrieval-augmented generation applications using Python and modern LLM frameworks.

My strongest areas include computer vision (real-time gesture recognition), predictive ML (healthcare classification), and emerging Gen AI (CrewAI multi-agent workflows, RAG systems). I enjoy solving practical problems and am always learning new tools at the frontier of AI.

Open to: Gen AI Developer · Python Developer · Data Science · ML roles
